narrative: An Applied ML Engineer at Zoho with seven years of experience, bringing product‑company exposure and a solid track record of stable roles. The strongest factor in the ranking is the verified skill depth demonstrated through hands‑on work with scikit‑learn, PyTorch, Milvus and BM25, directly matching the search and retrieval focus of the role. Additionally, the candidate’s breadth of technical skills and product‑centric background align well with a senior AI/ML position in a Pune/Noida product team. A modest drawback is lower platform engagement and minor credibility flags, plus an unknown notice period, which could affect hiring speed.
